subcodes.first_line: In all times and seasons the rustling of the Most Exalted Pen and the murmuring of the Tree beyond which there is no passing have been raised, yet the people of the earthly realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در جمیع احیان و اوان صریر قلم اعلی و حفیف سدره منتهی مرتفع ولکن اهل ناسوت انشا
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @empty learning; false spirituality
